elements.description: Unique identifier assigned to each student record upon initial enrollment in the district.
elements.content: Students table column StudentId. Primary key used to link student records across enrollment, attendance, and demographic tables. Data type INTEGER. Source table: Students.

elements.description: Legal first name of the student as recorded in the student information system.
elements.content: Students table column FirstName. Stores the student's legal first name used in official records, correspondence, and reporting. Data type VARCHAR. Source table: Students.

elements.description: Legal last name of the student as recorded in the student information system.
elements.content: Students table column LastName. Stores the student's legal last name used in official records, correspondence, and reporting. Data type VARCHAR. Source table: Students.

elements.description: Date the student was officially enrolled in the district.
elements.content: Students table column EnrollmentDate. Records the effective date of the student's enrollment in the district. Used for funding eligibility calculations and attendance tracking. Data type DATE. Source table: Students.

elements.description: Primary record identifier for the archive table entry.
elements.content: ARC01_TBL_A table column C01. Serves as the primary record identifier within the archive staging table. Data type VARCHAR. Source table: ARC01_TBL_A.

elements.description: Code value representing the classification category of the archived record.
elements.content: ARC01_TBL_A table column C02. Stores a classification code that categorizes the archived record. Interpretation depends on the context of the source extraction. Data type VARCHAR. Source table: ARC01_TBL_A.

elements.description: Descriptive text associated with the archived record.
elements.content: ARC01_TBL_A table column C03. Contains free-text descriptive content related to the archived entry. May overlap with descriptions found in other source tables. Data type VARCHAR. Source table: ARC01_TBL_A.

elements.description: Identifier of the student associated with the audited enrollment event.
elements.content: EnrollmentAudit table column StudentId. References the student linked to a specific enrollment audit record. Used to trace enrollment changes back to individual students. Data type INTEGER. Source table: EnrollmentAudit.

elements.description: Date the enrollment registration event was recorded in the audit log.
elements.content: EnrollmentAudit table column RegistrationDate. Captures the timestamp when an enrollment action was logged for audit purposes. Used to verify enrollment timelines and compliance. Data type DATE. Source table: EnrollmentAudit.

elements.description: Name of the originating system that generated the enrollment audit record.
elements.content: EnrollmentAudit table column SourceSystem. Identifies which upstream system produced the enrollment event being audited. Used for traceability across integrated platforms. Data type VARCHAR. Source table: EnrollmentAudit.
